title: EQ - Custom EQ - White circle when changing value on sliders
scenario: White circle appears around slider dot in Custom EQ mode and should follow user interaction, appearing on touch and disappearing on release for all 7 sliders.
steps: Open the audio settings and enable Custom EQ mode.
Locate any of the 7 sliders in the EQ interface.
Press and hold (or click and drag) the slider dot to change its value.
Observe whether a white circle appears around the dot during interaction.
While holding, move the slider to different positions.
expected: A white circle appears around the slider dot when interacting, follows the dot as it moves, and disappears when the slider is released. This behavior is consistent across all 7 sliders.
